body.title: DickSimnel: surface close() failure instead of silently completing
body.result: escalate on None return from cc_queue close(); 5 tests; 61235a31
body.description:
_post_result() calls _run_queue_cmd('close', ticket_id, note) and then unconditionally clears _active_ticket and posts DICKSIMNEL_DONE. If close() fails (returns None), the ticket stays in in_progress status and will be re-claimed on the next poll cycle, causing repeated WORKING posts for the same ticket.

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/device.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** In scope: check _run_queue_cmd close return value; escalate on failure. Out of scope: retry logic.
**Completion criteria:** (1) if _run_queue_cmd('close', ...) returns None, call _escalate_ticket() with reason='close failed'; (2) test: close failure → escalate not done; close success → done posted
